text:
Comment on attachment 179176
proposed fix: PyList_SET_ITEM -> PyList_SetItem

Looks OK and builds fine[1]. Can you land under "portmgr blanket" as a maintainer approval? Also add "MFH: 2017Q1" to commit message.
